input: The C4 contest has 9 days and we already submitted — should we keep hunting or move back to ImmuneFi pipeline?

ground.truth: Urgency narrows attention. Narrowed attention misses things. Haste produces the errors it fears.
ground.reframe: A slow correct submission beats a fast wrong one. The contest doesn't reward speed — it rewards accuracy.
claims: The C4 contest has 9 days and we already submitted — should we keep hunting or move back to ImmuneFi pipeline?
ground.next_act: Work at the pace quality demands, not the pace anxiety suggests.

examined.truth: Urgency narrows attention. Narrowed attention misses things. Haste produces the errors it fears.

examined.worst_case: You run out of time before finding anything else. You submit what you have.
examined.what_survives: Two confirmed Mediums with passing PoCs. Real findings. Real work.

act: Submit what is confirmed and passing. Then return to audit. Quality first.
